query:
INSERT INTO jobPostings (agencyId, title, description, location, salary, jobType, requirements, status, deadline, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
(1, 'Police Officer (Entry-Level)', 'Protect and serve the diverse communities of Chicago. Join one of the nation''s largest police departments with a rich history of public service and community engagement.', 'Chicago, IL 60653', '$72,000 - $98,000', 'Full-time', 'Must be 21 years of age or older. Valid driver''s license. Pass background check and medical examination.', 'approved', '2025-11-12', NOW(), NOW());
